apps.centerDescription: Connect integrations to boost your workflow
apps.checkUrl: Check the URL and try again.
apps.howToUseSoon: A detailed guide will be available soon.
apps.utmify.description: A sales tracking platform for TikTok, Facebook, Google, and Kwai.
apps.utmify.longDescription: Utmify integrates your traffic sources to track conversions accurately. Monitor campaigns by channel and optimize ROI with reliable metrics.
apps.utmify.step1: Create an Utmify account and generate your API key.
apps.utmify.step2: In the dashboard, go to Apps Center > Utmify and click Connect.
apps.utmify.step3: Paste the API key and define which events you want to send.
apps.utmify.step4: Finish setup and validate events in the conversion report.
apps.vega.description: Conversion-optimized checkout with multiple payment methods.
apps.vega.longDescription: Improve your checkout conversion with multiple methods and modern UX.
apps.luna.description: Modern, lightweight checkout for digital sales.
apps.shopify.description: Sell online with the most popular e-commerce platform.
apps.shopify.longDescription: Connect your store and sync products and orders.
apps.reportana.description: Advanced dashboards and reports for your business.
apps.reportana.longDescription: Build reports and track key indicators.
apps.webhooks.description: Trigger events to your URLs when platform actions happen.
apps.webhooks.longDescription: Register endpoints to receive events such as order creation, approved payment, and refunds.
